title: Jeff the Knocker
description: Replaces The Knocker with the old internet Creepypasta "Jeff the Killer".
body:
## Installation Guide
This resource pack is for [The Knocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-knocker) mod. You will need to have it installed, otherwise this has no effect on the game. And no, you do not need Optifine for this to work (hooray!). The Knocker is also currently only available for **1.19.2**, **1.20.1**, and **1.21.1**, effectively locking this resource pack to those respective versions.

## About 
With months of unexplained murders accross many villages and rural houses, locals and travelers are advised to keep watch for the possible suspect. He is described to have "cold, crazy eyes with burnt patches around them, black hair, pale skin with a carved smile on his face, and a filthy, white hoodie". Witnesses have reported hearing knocking on their doors and windows at night, finding their doors wide open, and even spotting deceased animals on their property. With the authorities still unable to trace the suspect's whereabouts, it is heavily advised to contact them, rather then to engage in combat with the suspect.
![Jeff the Killer as The Knocker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a7b2b8927a5410af31c3e2ed4fbf6ab0dcd8f89.png)
This resource pack revives the old internet Creepypasta "Jeff the Killer" to Minecraft, using M_Productions (Ma_Do)'s creation "The Knocker" as a vehicle to bring this idea to life.

## Terms of Use
### You may
* Use this pack in videos and streams
* Edit the pack for private use
* Parody packs, such as Jane the Killer, or Eyeless Jack.
### You may not
* Redistribute the pack on other sites
* Monetize the pack in any way, including childpacks
* Claim the pack as your own
